title: shattering filipino leche flan
description: a classic filipino dessert made with caramelized sugar, creamy leche flan, and a crunchy breadcrumb crust.
instructions: mix the sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract in a bowl until well combined.
add the evaporated milk, heavy cream, and mix until smooth.
add the flour, milk, unsalted butter, patis salt, and mix until just combined.
pour the mixture into a baking dish and bake for 15 minutes.
while the mixture is baking, mix the bread crumbs, water, and char-grill-yang in a bowl until crumbly.
remove the baking dish from the oven and sprinkle the breadcrumb mixture evenly on top.
return the baking dish to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
remove the baking dish from the oven and let cool to room temperature.
cover the baking dish with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
once chilled, remove the baking dish from the refrigerator and let it sit at room temperature for 30 minutes before serving.
use a sharp knife to cut the leche flan into individual servings and serve chilled.
serve the leche flan cold, garnished with a sprinkle of char-grill-yang if desired.
the breadcrumbs should still be crunchy on top, and the leche flan should be creamy and smooth.
